title: Too Ambitious? Analysts Say OpenAI's Billion-Dollar Advertising Revenue Vision May Be Hard to Achieve
excerpt: To open up new sources of funding for its massive operational costs, OpenAI has recently started testing ads in its chatbot and set a goal of $2.5 billion in ad
content_html:
To open up new sources of funding for its massive operational costs, OpenAI has recently started testing ads in its chatbot and set a goal of $2.5 billion in ad revenue this year and $100 billion by 2030. However, the latest research from the authoritative analytics firm eMarketer indicates that this ambitious forecast may be difficult to achieve on schedule due to the actual market capacity.

The study shows that by 2030, the total size of the independent chatbot advertising market is expected to reach only $5.4 billion, meaning that OpenAI's ad revenue at that time could fall short by as much as 90%. Although the industry trend has completely reversed, and CEO Sam Altman once called ads "a last resort," the reality of the market has still poured cold water on the commercial prospects of the AI giant.

Limitations of the Advertising Market Potential and High Computing Costs Pose Severe Challenges

Analysts believe that although the broader AI search advertising market has promising prospects, most of the funds will remain outside of independent conversations and are unlikely to be directly converted into chatbot revenue. Unless advertisers completely abandon traditional search engines and shift to robot experiences, and OpenAI fully wins in the fierce competition, the $100 billion target is highly unlikely to be achieved.

At the same time, OpenAI plans to spend up to $600 billion on computing power before 2030, creating a huge financial gap that makes it urgently necessary to find a feasible "money-printing" model. Although investors like Masayoshi Son remain willing to make large bets, before the economic model is truly proven, how to balance the huge expenses with actual advertising revenue will be the biggest challenge.

However, the latest research from the authoritative analytics firm eMarketer indicates that this ambitious forecast may be difficult to achieve on schedule due to the actual market capacity.

sentences.en: To open up new sources of funding for its massive operational costs, OpenAI has recently started testing ads in its chatbot and set a goal of $2.5 billion in ad revenue this year and $100 billion by 2030.
sentences.zh: 为了为其巨额运营成本开辟新的资金来源，OpenAI 最近开始在其聊天机器人中测试广告，并设定了今年广告收入达到 25 亿美元、到 2030 年达到 1000 亿美元的目标。

sentences.en: However, the latest research from the authoritative analytics firm eMarketer indicates that this ambitious forecast may be difficult to achieve on schedule due to the actual market capacity.
sentences.zh: 然而，权威分析公司eMarketer的最新研究表明，由于实际市场容量的限制，这一雄心勃勃的预测可能难以如期实现。

blocks.html_en: The study shows that by 2030, the total size of the independent chatbot advertising market is expected to reach only $5.4 billion, meaning that OpenAI's ad revenue at that time could fall short by as much as 90%. Although the industry trend has completely reversed, and CEO Sam Altman once called ads "a last resort," the reality of the market has still poured cold water on the commercial prospects of the AI giant.

sentences.en: The study shows that by 2030, the total size of the independent chatbot advertising market is expected to reach only $5.4 billion, meaning that OpenAI's ad revenue at that time could fall short by as much as 90%.
sentences.zh: 研究显示，到2030年，独立聊天机器人广告市场的总规模预计仅达到54亿美元，这意味着OpenAI当时的广告收入可能会缺口多达90%。

sentences.en: Although the industry trend has completely reversed, and CEO Sam Altman once called ads "a last resort," the reality of the market has still poured cold water on the commercial prospects of the AI giant.
sentences.zh: 尽管行业趋势已经完全逆转，CEO萨姆·奥尔特曼也曾将广告称为“最后的手段”，但市场的现实仍然给这家AI巨头的商业前景泼了一盆冷水。

blocks.html_en: Limitations of the Advertising Market Potential and High Computing Costs Pose Severe Challenges

sentences.en: Limitations of the Advertising Market Potential and High Computing Costs Pose Severe Challenges
sentences.zh: 广告市场潜力的限制和高计算成本带来严峻挑战

blocks.html_en: Analysts believe that although the broader AI search advertising market has promising prospects, most of the funds will remain outside of independent conversations and are unlikely to be directly converted into chatbot revenue. Unless advertisers completely abandon traditional search engines and shift to robot experiences, and OpenAI fully wins in the fierce competition, the $100 billion target is highly unlikely to be achieved.

sentences.en: Analysts believe that although the broader AI search advertising market has promising prospects, most of the funds will remain outside of independent conversations and are unlikely to be directly converted into chatbot revenue.
sentences.zh: 分析师认为，尽管更广泛的人工智能搜索广告市场前景广阔，但大部分资金仍将处于独立对话之外，不太可能直接转化为聊天机器人收入。

sentences.en: Unless advertisers completely abandon traditional search engines and shift to robot experiences, and OpenAI fully wins in the fierce competition, the $100 billion target is highly unlikely to be achieved.
sentences.zh: 除非广告商完全放弃传统搜索引擎并转向机器人体验，并且OpenAI在激烈的竞争中全面获胜，否则1000亿美元的目标不太可能实现。

blocks.html_en: At the same time, OpenAI plans to spend up to $600 billion on computing power before 2030, creating a huge financial gap that makes it urgently necessary to find a feasible "money-printing" model. Although investors like Masayoshi Son remain willing to make large bets, before the economic model is truly proven, how to balance the huge expenses with actual advertising revenue will be the biggest challenge.

sentences.en: At the same time, OpenAI plans to spend up to $600 billion on computing power before 2030, creating a huge financial gap that makes it urgently necessary to find a feasible "money-printing" model.
sentences.zh: 与此同时，OpenAI计划在2030年之前在算力上花费高达6000亿美元，造成巨大的资金缺口，迫切需要找到可行的“印钞”模式。

sentences.en: Although investors like Masayoshi Son remain willing to make large bets, before the economic model is truly proven, how to balance the huge expenses with actual advertising revenue will be the biggest challenge.
sentences.zh: 尽管像孙正义这样的投资者仍然愿意下大赌注，但在经济模型真正得到验证之前，如何平衡巨额开支与实际广告收入将是最大的挑战。

content_html_zh:
为了为其巨额运营成本开辟新的资金来源，OpenAI 最近开始在其聊天机器人中测试广告，并设定了今年广告收入达到 25 亿美元、到 2030 年达到 1000 亿美元的目标。 然而，权威分析公司eMarketer的最新研究表明，由于实际市场容量的限制，这一雄心勃勃的预测可能难以如期实现。

研究显示，到2030年，独立聊天机器人广告市场的总规模预计仅达到54亿美元，这意味着OpenAI当时的广告收入可能会缺口多达90%。 尽管行业趋势已经完全逆转，CEO萨姆·奥尔特曼也曾将广告称为“最后的手段”，但市场的现实仍然给这家AI巨头的商业前景泼了一盆冷水。

广告市场潜力的限制和高计算成本带来严峻挑战

分析师认为，尽管更广泛的人工智能搜索广告市场前景广阔，但大部分资金仍将处于独立对话之外，不太可能直接转化为聊天机器人收入。 除非广告商完全放弃传统搜索引擎并转向机器人体验，并且OpenAI在激烈的竞争中全面获胜，否则1000亿美元的目标不太可能实现。

与此同时，OpenAI计划在2030年之前在算力上花费高达6000亿美元，造成巨大的资金缺口，迫切需要找到可行的“印钞”模式。 尽管像孙正义这样的投资者仍然愿意下大赌注，但在经济模型真正得到验证之前，如何平衡巨额开支与实际广告收入将是最大的挑战。
